--- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import PageHero from '../components/PageHero.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; import { business } from '../data/site'; const team = [ { name: 'Ray Delgado', role: 'Founder & Lead Hauler', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560250097-0b93528c311a?auto=format&fit=crop&w=600&q=80', bio: 'Started ClearOut with one truck in 2014. Still rides along on the big estate jobs.', }, { name: 'Marcus Webb', role: 'Operations Manager', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=600&q=80', bio: 'Keeps every crew on schedule and every quote honest. Logistics wizard.', }, { name: 'Tasha Greer', role: 'Donation Coordinator', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1573497019940-1c28c88b4f3e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=600&q=80', bio: 'Routes every reusable item to the right local charity partner.', }, { name: 'Diego Santos', role: 'Crew Lead', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1568602471122-7832951cc4c5?auto=format&fit=crop&w=600&q=80', bio: 'Ten years on the truck. Treats every home like it’s his grandmother’s.', }, ]; const metrics = [ { value: '2014', label: 'Locally Owned Since' }, { value: '12,400+', label: 'Loads Hauled' }, { value: '68%', label: 'Landfill Diversion Rate' }, { value: '4.6★', label: '150+ Google Reviews' }, ]; const credentials = [ { icon: 'shield', t: 'Licensed & Bonded', d: `Operating under ${business.legalName}, fully licensed for residential & commercial hauling in ${business.address.regionName}.` }, { icon: 'check-circle', t: '$2M Liability Insurance', d: 'Comprehensive general liability and workers’ comp coverage protects your property on every job.' }, { icon: 'users', t: 'Background-Checked Crews', d: 'Every team member is vetted, uniformed and trained in safe-lifting and damage-free removal.' }, { icon: 'recycle', t: 'DNR-Compliant Disposal', d: 'We follow Wisconsin DNR guidelines for e-waste, appliances with refrigerants, and hazardous separation.' }, ]; ---

10+

Years Serving
{business.address.city}

Our Story

From one truck to the metro's most-trusted haulers.

ClearOut started in {business.founded} with a single truck, a phone number, and a simple promise: show up on time, charge a fair price, and never leave a mess behind. Word spread fast across {business.address.city} — because honest hauling is harder to find than it should be.

A decade later we run a fleet of clean dump trucks and a roster of background-checked, uniformed crews. But the promise hasn't changed. We still quote upfront, we still sweep up after, and we still personally route every reusable item to a local home instead of a landfill.

When you call ClearOut, you're not getting a faceless franchise. You're getting neighbors who care what happens to your junk after it leaves your driveway.

See Our Work
{ metrics.map((m) => (

{m.value}

{m.label}

)) }

Our Mission

Keeping junk out of landfills — one load at a time.

Hauling is the easy part. Doing it responsibly is what sets us apart. Every load we pick up gets sorted before it ever sees a dumpster. Our three-stream process means the majority of what we collect finds a second life.

{ [ { icon: 'heart', t: 'Donate First', d: 'Furniture, working appliances and household goods go to local shelters, Habitat ReStores and family-support charities.' }, { icon: 'recycle', t: 'Recycle Second', d: 'Metal, e-waste, cardboard, concrete and yard waste are routed to certified recycling facilities — not the dump.' }, { icon: 'truck', t: 'Dispose Responsibly', d: 'Only what truly can\'t be reused goes to a licensed transfer station, sorted and compliant with WI DNR rules.' }, ].map((s) => (

{s.t}

{s.d}

)) }

Licensed. Insured. Accountable.

The credentials behind every truck.

We carry the licensing and coverage that commercial property managers, realtors and contractors require — and that homeowners deserve.

{ credentials.map((c) => (

{c.t}

{c.d}

)) }

Meet The Crew

The people who haul it all.

{ team.map((t) => ( )) }

--- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import PageHero from '../components/PageHero.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; import { business, services } from '../data/site'; const estimatorItems = services.map((s) => ({ title: s.title, icon: s.icon })); // Web3Forms access key — safe to expose in the frontend (that's how Web3Forms works). // Set it in a `.env` file as PUBLIC_WEB3FORMS_KEY=xxxxxxxx-xxxx-... (get it free at web3forms.com). const web3formsKey = import.meta.env.PUBLIC_WEB3FORMS_KEY ?? 'YOUR_WEB3FORMS_ACCESS_KEY'; ---
{ [ { icon: 'phone', label: 'Call Dispatch', value: business.phone, href: business.phoneHref, note: business.hours }, { icon: 'mail', label: 'Email Us', value: business.email, href: business.emailHref, note: 'Replies within 1 business hour' }, { icon: 'pin', label: 'Visit / Mail', value: `${business.address.city}, ${business.address.region}`, href: '#service-area', note: business.address.street }, ].map((c) => (

{c.label}

 )) }
x!==i) : this.items.push(i) }, next(){ if(this.step < this.maxStep) this.step++ }, back(){ if(this.step > 1) this.step-- }, async submit(){ if (this.sending) return; this.sending = true; this.error = ''; try { const res = await fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ access_key: '${web3formsKey}', subject: 'New Quote Request — ClearOut Junk Removal', from_name: 'ClearOut Website', botcheck: this.botcheck, name: this.form.name, email: this.form.email, phone: this.form.phone, pickup_zip: this.form.zip, items: this.items.length ? this.items.join(', ') : 'General junk', truckload: this.loadLabels[this.load], estimated_price: this.priceRanges[this.load], location_access: this.access, urgency: this.urgency, }), }); const data = await res.json(); if (data.success) { this.submitted = true; } else { this.error = data.message || 'Something went wrong. Please call us instead.'; } } catch (e) { this.error = 'Network error — please call us at the number above.'; } finally { this.sending = false; } }, }`} >

--- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import PageHero from '../components/PageHero.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; // Before/after pairs + standalone job shots. `before`/`after` drive the // hover-to-reveal cards; the lightbox opens the full-resolution image. const pairs = [ { label: 'Garage Cleanout', area: 'Sun Prairie, WI', before: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1530124566582-a618bc2615dc?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', after: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504148455328-c376907d081c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', }, { label: 'Living Room Furniture Haul', area: 'Madison, WI', before: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1493663284031-b7e3aefcae8e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', after: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', }, { label: 'Basement Clear-Out', area: 'Middleton, WI', before: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558211583-d26f610c1eb1?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', after: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600566753190-17f0baa2a6c3?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', }, ]; const shots = [ { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504307651254-35680f356dfd?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', label: 'Construction debris load', area: 'Fitchburg, WI' }, { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1416879595882-3373a0480b5b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', label: 'Yard waste & brush', area: 'Verona, WI' }, { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581622558663-b2e33377dfb2?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', label: 'Appliance recycling', area: 'Monona, WI' }, { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600880292203-757bb62b4baf?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', label: 'Crew loading the truck', area: 'Madison, WI' }, { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1532996122724-e3c354a0b15b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', label: 'Sorted for recycling', area: 'Madison, WI' }, { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585152220-90363fe7e115?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', label: 'Estate cleanout, swept clean', area: 'Stoughton, WI' }, ]; // Flat list of every image for the lightbox, with captions. const lightboxImages = [ ...pairs.flatMap((p) => [ { src: p.before, caption: `${p.label} — Before · ${p.area}` }, { src: p.after, caption: `${p.label} — After · ${p.area}` }, ]), ...shots.map((s) => ({ src: s.src, caption: `${s.label} · ${s.area}` })), ]; ---

sections.source:
--- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; import { business, services, trustPoints, howItWorks } from '../data/site'; import { posts, formatDate } from '../data/posts'; // Latest three articles for the home-page blog teaser. const latestPosts = [...posts] .sort((a, b) => (a.date < b.date ? 1 : -1)) .slice(0, 3); // Featured case studies for the home-page projects teaser. const featuredProjects = [ { title: 'Full Hoarder House Cleanout', location: 'Madison, WI', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558211583-d26f610c1eb1?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', tag: 'Estate Cleanout', stats: [ { label: 'Truckloads', value: '9' }, { label: 'Diverted', value: '75%' }, { label: 'Timeline', value: '3 days' }, ], }, { title: '3-Ton Office Debris Haul', location: 'Fitchburg, WI', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366754035-f200968a6e72?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', tag: 'Commercial', stats: [ { label: 'Weight', value: '3.1 tons' }, { label: 'Recycled', value: '62%' }, { label: 'Downtime', value: '0 hrs' }, ], }, { title: 'Estate Downsizing & Move-Out', location: 'Middleton, WI', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154526-990dced4db0d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', tag: 'Downsizing', stats: [ { label: 'Truckloads', value: '5' }, { label: 'Donated', value: '58%' }, { label: 'Timeline', value: '1 day' }, ], }, ]; const reviews = [ { name: 'Marcus T.', area: 'Middleton, WI', text: 'Booked online at 8am, junk was gone by noon. The crew was respectful, fast, and the price matched the quote exactly. No surprise fees.', }, { name: 'Priya N.', area: 'Sun Prairie, WI', text: 'They cleared out my late father\'s garage with so much care. Donated what they could and sent me photos of where it went. Truly above and beyond.', }, { name: 'Dave & Carol R.', area: 'Fitchburg, WI', text: 'Full basement reno debris hauled in one trip. On time, uniformed, and they swept up after. Already booked them for the next phase.', }, ]; ---

We Remove
Your Junk.

You relax. We do the heavy lifting.

    { trustPoints.map((tp) => (

    • )) }
Call us today {business.phone}

sections.source:
--- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import PageHero from '../components/PageHero.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; const projects = [ { title: 'Full Hoarder House Cleanout', location: 'Madison, WI · Single-Family Home', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558211583-d26f610c1eb1?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', summary: 'A compassionate, three-day clear-out of a packed two-story home. We worked alongside the family, set aside keepsakes and documents, and restored every room to a safe, walkable, market-ready state.', stats: [ { label: 'Truckloads', value: '9' }, { label: 'Donated', value: '40%' }, { label: 'Recycled', value: '35%' }, { label: 'Timeline', value: '3 days' }, ], tags: ['Estate Cleanout', 'Sensitive', 'Donation Routed'], }, { title: '3-Ton Office Debris Haul', location: 'Fitchburg, WI · Commercial Build-Out', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366754035-f200968a6e72?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', summary: 'A 12,000 sq ft office gut for a remodeling GC. Daily on-call hauls kept the demolition crew moving while we separated metal, ceiling grid, carpet and drywall for maximum diversion.', stats: [ { label: 'Weight', value: '3.1 tons' }, { label: 'Recycled', value: '62%' }, { label: 'Hauls', value: '6' }, { label: 'Downtime', value: '0 hrs' }, ], tags: ['Construction Debris', 'Commercial', 'Recurring'], }, { title: 'Estate Downsizing & Move-Out', location: 'Middleton, WI · 4-Bedroom Home', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154526-990dced4db0d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', summary: 'Helped a family downsize a parent\'s longtime home ahead of an assisted-living move. Furniture and housewares were donated locally with receipts provided; the home was left broom-clean for listing.', stats: [ { label: 'Truckloads', value: '5' }, { label: 'Donated', value: '58%' }, { label: 'Recycled', value: '22%' }, { label: 'Timeline', value: '1 day' }, ], tags: ['Estate', 'Downsizing', 'Realtor Coordinated'], }, { title: 'Two-Car Garage Restoration', location: 'Sun Prairie, WI · Residential Garage', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504148455328-c376907d081c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', summary: 'A decade of accumulated boxes, broken equipment and old tires cleared in a single afternoon. The homeowner parked both cars inside that night for the first time in years.', stats: [ { label: 'Truckloads', value: '1.5' }, { label: 'Recycled', value: '48%' }, { label: 'Donated', value: '18%' }, { label: 'Timeline', value: '3 hrs' }, ], tags: ['Garage Cleanout', 'Residential', 'Same-Day'], }, { title: 'Storm Debris Rapid Response', location: 'Verona, WI · Half-Acre Property', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1547683905-f686c993aae5?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', summary: 'After a derecho took down mature trees, we dispatched a crew same-day to clear fallen limbs and brush from the driveway and yard. All organic debris was mulched at a regional facility.', stats: [ { label: 'Truckloads', value: '4' }, { label: 'Mulched', value: '100%' }, { label: 'Response', value: 'Same-day' }, { label: 'Crew', value: '3' }, ], tags: ['Yard Waste', 'Storm Response', 'Composted'], }, { title: 'Retail Renovation Clear-Out', location: 'Monona, WI · Storefront', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', summary: 'Removed dated fixtures, shelving, signage and flooring from a 4,000 sq ft retail space overnight, letting the new tenant\'s build-out begin first thing the next morning.', stats: [ { label: 'Truckloads', value: '3' }, { label: 'Recycled', value: '55%' }, { label: 'Window', value: 'Overnight' }, { label: 'Fixtures', value: 'Donated' }, ], tags: ['Commercial', 'Fixtures', 'After-Hours'], }, ]; const totals = [ { value: '12,400+', label: 'Jobs Completed' }, { value: '68%', label: 'Average Diversion' }, { value: '3.2M lbs', label: 'Kept From Landfill' }, { value: '4.6★', label: 'Customer Rating' }, ]; ---
{ totals.map((t) => (

)) }
